evidenceSnippetOriginal: Understand that in most cases, the data you share is not private and will be accessible by external parties hosting the GenAI-based tools. Do not share information that is considered private, or sensitive, such as credit card information, personal details such as ID numbers or addresses, and so on.
evidenceLocator: Choosing a GenAI tool to use - Privacy risks
